name: Thal-Quartzhaven
personality: Equal parts spell-capped and formidable, this capybara's four-pointed eyes ensure it has never rage-quit a failing test suite. Its coat shimmers with the quality of code it has never written carelessly. Thal-Quartzhaven finds unpredictability physically uncomfortable, but whatever you're using, it will work alongside it without complaint.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
